Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Million Hearts® CVD Risk Reduction Model Medicare Data Files Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 43 

TINS 

LABEL: List of Taxpayer Identification Numbers for the Practice 

DESCRIPTION: List of federal Taxpayer Identification Numbers (TINs) for the practice. 

SHORT NAME: TINS 

LONG NAME: TINS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 4000 

FILE(S): Practice 

SOURCE: Million Hearts Data Registry 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is a list of one or more TINs
